name: year splits with a column set to a specific year
description: Test case for year splits with a column set to a specific year
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2000,2001,2002,2003,2004,2005,2006,2007,2008,2009,2010,2011,2012,2013,2014,2015,2016,2017,2018,2019,2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('DST')), "t0de0fb3e4fb6c788d4625bcfee17d81f" as (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "team", count(distinct "nfl_plays"."esbid") as "rate_type_total_count", "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76" as (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(epa) AS team_ep_added_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."wp" between 0.2 and 0.8 group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76_team_stats" as (select "t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76"."nfl_team", sum(t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76.team_ep_added_from_plays) as team_ep_added_from_plays, "t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76"."year" from "t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76" group by "t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76"."nfl_team", "t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76"."year") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CAST(t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76_team_stats.team_ep_added_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t0de0fb3e4fb6c788d4625bcfee17d81f.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "team_ep_added_from_plays_0", CAST(t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76_team_stats.team_ep_added_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t0de0fb3e4fb6c788d4625bcfee17d81f.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "team_ep_added_from_plays_1", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t0de0fb3e4fb6c788d4625bcfee17d81f" on "t0de0fb3e4fb6c788d4625bcfee17d81f"."team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" and "t0de0fb3e4fb6c788d4625bcfee17d81f"."year" = 2023 left join "t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76_team_stats" on "t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" and t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76_team_stats.year = player_years.year and t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76_team_stats.year IN (2023,2022,2021,2020,2019,2018,2017,2016,2015,2014,2013,2012,2011,2010,2009,2008,2007,2006,2005,2004,2003,2002,2001,2000) where player.pos IN ('DST') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76_team_stats"."team_ep_added_from_plays", t0de0fb3e4fb6c788d4625bcfee17d81f.rate_type_total_count, "t6b4a21764b5d5915ce80235733171c76_team_stats"."team_ep_added_from_plays", t0de0fb3e4fb6c788d4625bcfee17d81f.rate_type_total_count, "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
